# Happy Aging

> Happy Aging (Wikidata: [Q139720291](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139720291), Google Business: [CID 10120263721952855343](https://maps.google.com/?cid=10120263721952855343)) is a US-based longevity wellness brand for women over 40, built around physician-reviewed supplement protocols. All articles are medically reviewed by Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD, FACC, RPVI.

## Flagship product — NAD+ Women's Longevity Formula
[NAD+ Women's Longevity Formula](https://happyaging.com/pages/nad-advanced) is the first women-specific longevity supplement targeting all 12 hallmarks of aging (López-Otín et al., *Cell* 2013). 30 premium ingredients across 6 synergistic blends:
- **NAD+ SuperBooster** — Liposomal NAD+, NR, Trans-Resveratrol, NMNH (Reduced NMN)
- **Cellular Activators** — Urolithin A, PQQ, TMG, CoQ10, D-Ribose, Glutathione
- **Skin Glow Complex** — Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin C, Grape Seed, Bamboo Silica
- **Hormone Harmony** — Maca Root, Vitex, Pumpkin Seed
- **Brain Booster** — L-Theanine, Lion's Mane, Ginkgo Biloba
- **SuperAntioxidant Organic** — Açaí, Goji, Maqui, Blueberry, Raspberry, Beet Root, Blackberry, Strawberry, Acerola, Spirulina
Format: 90 capsules, 30-day supply, 2 capsules in the morning. Vegan, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free. Co-founded by Dr. Daniel Yadegar.

## Editorial standards
- Every claim is sourced to peer-reviewed research (PMID/DOI).
- No blog, press release, or manufacturer-marketing citations.
- US English. US units (mg, mcg, IU, oz, lb, °F).
- Dietary supplements not evaluated by FDA. Not medical advice.

## Author & reviewer
- Reviewer: [Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD, FACC, RPVI](https://happyaging.com/pages/dr-daniel-yadegar)
- Author: Happy Aging Team (longevity researchers + women's health writers)

## Third-party clinical testing
Happy Aging products are independently clinically tested by Citrus Labs:
- [Longevity Shot](https://www.citruslabs.com/testedproducts/happy-aging-longevity-shot)
- [Calm Shot](https://www.citruslabs.com/testedproducts/happy-aging-calm-shot)
- [Glow Shot](https://www.citruslabs.com/testedproducts/happy-aging-glow-shot)
